notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Mauricio Dubón reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Nolan Arenado. Ozzie Albies to 3rd. Dominic Smith to 2nd. Fielding error by third baseman Nolan Arenado.

notableEvents.label: Jose Fernandez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jose Fernandez grounds out, third baseman Austin Riley to first baseman Matt Olson.

notableEvents.label: Jordan Lawlar plunked
notableEvents.detail: Jordan Lawlar hit by pitch. Ildemaro Vargas to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jorge Barrosa GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Barrosa grounds into a double play, second baseman Ozzie Albies to shortstop Mauricio Dubón to first baseman Matt Olson. Jordan Lawlar out at 2nd. Jorge Barrosa out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jorge Barrosa rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Barrosa grounds into a double play, second baseman Ozzie Albies to shortstop Mauricio Dubón to first baseman Matt Olson. Jordan Lawlar out at 2nd. Jorge Barrosa out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: James McCann pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: James McCann grounds out, shortstop Mauricio Dubón to first baseman Matt Olson.

notableEvents.label: Jose Fernandez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jose Fernandez grounds out, third baseman Kyle Farmer to first baseman Matt Olson.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Farmer pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Farmer singles on a line drive to left fielder Tim Tawa.

notableEvents.label: Jorge Mateo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Mateo homers (1) on a fly ball to left field. Michael Harris II scores.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Farmer pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Farmer out on a sacrifice fly to left fielder Tim Tawa. Drake Baldwin scores.
